title: pimpinella wallichiana var. katrajensis
intro: Pimpinella wallichiana var. katrajensis, also known as Katraj or Indian anise, is a plant species belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae), native to the Himalayan region. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive problems, and treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Pimpinella wallichiana var. katrajensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine to treat various ailments.
